ModMetaData.name: Kept You Waiting, Huh?
ModMetaData.author: AIvanCP
ModMetaData.description:
Plays a custom sound effect when a pawn joins your colony from outside the map (wanderers, refugees, event-based arrivals, etc.).
Does NOT trigger on in-colony prisoner recruitment.
Optional (disabled by default): also play a sound when orbital (comms) traders or walk-in trader caravans arrive at your colony.
Configure everything in Mod Settings → Kept You Waiting, Huh?
Replace the placeholder .ogg files in the Sounds/JoinSound/ folder with your own audio. See the README for details.
